examples: She told off her children for making a mess.
Don't tell me off in front of everyone!
The teacher told him off for being late.
They told off the employee for the mistake.
He got told off by his boss.
example_translate: Она отругала своих детей за беспорядок.
Они сделали выговор сотруднику за ошибку.
tell off.synonyms: Ругать, делать выговор - scold, reprimand, rebuke
